description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with lint, build, test, and deploy stages, using a Linux private runner (tags private, linux) and a global before_script that enables tracing, updates apt, installs gawk wget git-core diffstat unzip python3 texinfo gcc-multilib build-essential chrpath libsdl1.2-dev xterm cpio locales, sysstat iproute2 vnc4server, configures the en_US.UTF-8 locale, adds a ciuser, and prints git and python versions. Define a global cache keyed "global" that stores sstate-cache and downloads under /var/cache/gitlab-ci, and set global variables such as ARTIFACT_DOWNLOAD_ATTEMPTS, BB_GENERATE_MIRROR_TARBALLS, DL_DIR, GET_SOURCES_ATTEMPTS, GIT_DEPTH, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, LANG, OE_STRICT_CHECKSUMS, PATCH_RESOLVE, RESTORE_CACHE_ATTEMPTS, and SSTATE_DIR. In the build stage add qemuarm_build and qemux86_build jobs (allow_failure true, tags private/linux) that run "source $CI_PROJECT_DIR/init-build-env", copy /etc/openembedded/site.conf to $BUILDDIR/conf/site.conf if it exists, then execute "bitbake containos-image-base" and publish the "build/" directory as an artifact. In the test stage add qemuarm_test and qemux86_test jobs (allow_failure true, tags private/linux, dependent on their respective build jobs) that start a VNC server (vncserver :1 &), source the init script, copy site.conf if present, append "INHERIT += \"testimage\"" to $BUILDDIR/conf/local.conf, run "bitbake -c testimage containos-image-base", set DISPLAY=:1 and MACHINE accordingly, and collect artifacts from build/testimage/qemu_boot_log, build/testimage/ssh_target_log, and build/temp/log.do_testimage. Finally, add a quickstart job in the lint stage that creates a temporary build directory, determines whether to run as root or switch to ciuser, sources the init script, and runs "$setuser bitbake --dry-run containos-image-base", with tags private/linux and MACHINE set to bananapi.
